name: Herbag cloth tote
description:
Hermes Vache Hunter Toile Herbag Zip Retourne 31 PM Bambou

Condition: Pre-owned in excellent condition with minimal signs of use, approximately 9.9/10. Very clean inside and out. Comes with a shoulder strap, a removable pouch, a padlock, 2 keys, a dust bag, and its original box. Please examine the photos carefully for details.

Description:
-Stamp Y
-This is an authentic Hermes Vache Hunter Toile Herbag Zip 31 PM in Bambou and Khaki. This elegant large tote is made of sturdy, bright green canvas.
-The handbag has an exterior back zip pocket, a dark green leather top crest with a leather top handle, a shoulder strap, and a strap closure with palladium hardware.
-The interior opens to a canvas space with a removable pouch.
-Dimensions: W 12.2” / H 9.84” / D 3.94”
                   W 31 x H 25 x D 11 cm
 Handle drop: 2.76” / 7 cm
 Max shoulder strap drop: 18.11” / 46 cm
